mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_audit_records ( audit_type, target_id, target_type, recall_reason, audit_decision, audit_reason, risk_level, ai_remark, model_used, audit_time, audit_duration, status, error_message, create_time ) VALUES ( #{auditType}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{recallReason}, #{auditDecision}, #{auditReason}, #{riskLevel}, #{aiRemark}, #{modelUsed}, #{auditTime}, #{auditDuration}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_audit_records WHERE audit_type = #{auditType} ORDER BY audit_time DESC LIMIT 100
